events.description: Your tax preparation meeting scheduled for Monday, March 2, 2026 at 4:00 PM. Location: My office or Video Call (your choice). Office address provided. Virtual meeting link will be sent if preferred. Required documents: W-2s, 1099 forms, last year's tax return, mortgage interest statements (1098), property tax bills, charitable donation receipts. Upload documents securely at https://parkaccounting.com/upload
